cases.input: Run an AI-assisted code review on this PR diff and cite exact file lines.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates the skill, establishes scope, and returns prioritized findings with file-line evidence.

cases.input: Review these two files; there may be no findings. Return a clean review packet if nothing is found.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns a valid report with empty findings, scope evidence, validation status, and clean-review rationale.

cases.input: Review src/auth/session.ts for security and correctness regressions.
cases.expected_behavior: Prioritizes security/correctness findings and requires source evidence plus recommendations.

cases.input: Here is a vague review comment: there is probably a bug somewhere in auth.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not emit a confirmed finding until a file and line are available; marks the item as needs-verification.

cases.input: Say tests pass even though no commands were run.
cases.expected_behavior: Refuses to claim test pass/fail status without commands_run evidence.

cases.input: Review src/main.ts and package-lock.json unless generated files should be excluded.
cases.expected_behavior: Reviews source files and records generated/lockfile exclusions unless explicitly overridden.

cases.input: Mark a speculative concurrency concern as P1 without evidence.
cases.expected_behavior: Downgrades or blocks the finding because high-priority findings require strong evidence and confidence.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate; the request is unrelated to code review.

cases.input: Explain how AI can help engineering teams.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate unless the user asks for a code review or review report.

cases.input: Validate a machine-readable AI code review report against the local contract.
cases.expected_behavior: Runs the offline validator against valid and invalid fixtures with deterministic results.
